'''Karvinna Raen''' was a shy and quiet researcher who worked with [[Elth Nardah]]. She was fascinated by how beings coped both with and apart from the presence of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]]. She carefully cultivated a plain appearance, with short brown hair and dark eyes. Her primary job was to be the official recorder of all treaty negotiations. She was never separated from her [[Holorecorder/Legends|holorecorder]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|Stranded|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
